name: Tim Hauser
abstract: Timothy DuPron Hauser (December 12, 1941 – October 16, 2014) was an American singer and founding member of the Manhattan Transfer vocal group. He won 10 Grammy Awards as a member of The Manhattan Transfer.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Modern Jazz Quartet 40th Anniversary Concert
JVC Jazz Festival: The Manhattan Transfer
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: after the Manhattan Transfer album came out... Tim Hauser sang the solo.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
